title: ayenia besalampensis
intro: Ayenia besalampensis, also known as Besalampy's ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia besalampensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Ayenia besalampensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
